absorption: Aggressive buyers are being absorbed by passive sellers at the VAH (62825.6), indicated by high volume on the ask side of the footprint (438 lots) with no upward price movement.
dom_observation: Price is stalling at the current level despite buying attempts. A large 442 lot ask wall is visible higher up at 63000, acting as further resistance.
reasoning: Fiyat, VAH seviyesinde agresif alicilarin pasif saticilar tarafindan absorbe edildigi net bir ASK absorption sergiliyor, bu da yukselisin devam edememesine ve potansiyel bir donuse isaret ediyor.
